common.offline: You're offline. Changes are saved locally.

preferences.title: Plan your celebration
preferences.subtitle: Choose your destination, dates, and group size to get started.
preferences.heroTitle: Build a polished trip request in minutes.
preferences.heroSubtitle: Pick your destination, dates, and budget. We'll tailor activities, transport, accommodation, and your final quote.
preferences.chooseBelow: Choose one of the destinations below.
preferences.chooseDestinationSub: Select where you'd like to go. We'll tailor the rest of your trip around it.
preferences.budgetHint: A planning signal, not a hard cap.
preferences.validationDestination: Choose a destination to unlock the itinerary suggestions.
preferences.validationDates: Select travel dates for your quote.
preferences.validationDatesOrder: Your end date must be after your start date.

activities.title: Choose your experiences
activities.subtitle: Select the activities for your group. Mix and match across categories.
activities.validationMin: Choose at least one activity for your quote request.
activities.noDestinationSub: We need a destination before we can suggest experiences.
activities.chooseSub: Choose the activities that feel essential. We'll use them to build your day-by-day proposal and final quote.
activities.noActivitiesSub: Activities for this destination are being curated. Check back soon or try another destination.

transport.title: Getting around
transport.subtitle: Choose how your group will travel.
transport.validationMin: Choose one transport option to keep the quote coherent.
transport.chooseSub: Pick one lead transport option. We'll confirm availability and logistics after you submit your quote.

accommodation.title: Where to stay
accommodation.subtitle: Pick the perfect base for your group.
accommodation.validationMin: Choose one accommodation option before continuing.
accommodation.noDestinationSub: Accommodation suggestions depend on the destination you picked.
accommodation.chooseFor: Pick the kind of stay you want in {{destination}}
accommodation.chooseSub: Select one accommodation option. We'll confirm availability and handle any upgrade requests in your quote.

schedule.title: Your optimized schedule
schedule.subtitle: Our AI arranges your activities for the best flow. Adjust anything that doesn't feel right.
schedule.suggestSuccess: Schedule suggested — feel free to adjust anything.
schedule.assignAll: Assign every selected activity to a day and time slot.
schedule.noActivitiesSub: Go back and choose at least one experience before scheduling.

review.title: Review your trip
review.subtitle: Check everything looks good before requesting a quote.
review.quoteSubmitted: Your quote request has been submitted!
review.pageTitle: Review your trip and request a quote
review.pageSubtitle: Once you submit, we'll confirm availability, fine-tune the itinerary, and send back the quote.
review.priceConfirmed: Final price confirmed after availability check
review.tellUsHow: Tell us how to reach you and any final preferences.
review.signedInAs: Signed in as {{email}}. We'll link this request to your profile.
review.notesPlaceholder: Example: celebrating an anniversary, twin beds preferred, vegetarian meals, private guide, etc.
review.nextStep1: We review availability for your selections
review.nextStep2: We send you a final quote with confirmed prices
review.nextStep3: You confirm and we lock in your celebration
review.quoteReceivedSub: Thanks — your trip request is now in our queue. We'll review availability and follow up with a tailored quote.
review.quoteError: Unable to submit your quote request.
review.validationIncomplete: Please complete the missing items before submitting:
review.validationEmailFormat: Please enter a valid email address.
review.validationPhoneFormat: Please enter a valid phone number.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.notifQuotesDesc: When your quote is reviewed or ready

group.title: Your group
group.inviteLink: Share this link with your group
group.createDescription: Create a group to start planning together.

home.subtitle: Plan unforgettable group trips.
home.smartRecoSub: Hand-picked activities, venues, and stays tailored to your group.
home.easyPlanningSub: Our AI builds the perfect day-by-day itinerary for your group.
home.completeSolutionSub: Activities, accommodation, and transport — one quote, zero hassle.
home.howItWorksSub: From idea to confirmed trip in just a few minutes.
home.stepChooseDesc: Destination, dates, budget, and activities. Build your ideal trip.
home.stepPlanDesc: Our AI builds the perfect schedule. Adjust as you like.
home.stepBookDesc: Submit your quote request. We confirm availability and book it all.
home.readySubtitle: No payment required. Get a personalized quote within hours.

auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up

tripSummary.title: Trip summary
tripSummary.liveEstimate: A live estimate of the trip you're building.
tripSummary.tailorAfter: We'll tailor the rest of the trip after this step.
tripSummary.transportHint: Choose a suggested option on the transport step.
tripSummary.accommodationHint: Choose a suggested stay on the accommodation step.
tripSummary.totalHint: Your final quote may adjust slightly once we confirm availability and upgrades.

joinGroup.title: Join the celebration
joinGroup.subtitle: You've been invited to join a trip group!

error.unexpectedMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
